items.title: Agent overview sidebar
items.description: New agent sidebar with tree lines, status, and manager-mode orchestration for multi-task supervision.

items.title: Task progress field
items.description: Track 0–100 progress per task with a progress ring in kanban, plus UI and CLI support.

items.title: slay init CLI
items.description: Bootstrap a project with SlayZone instructions and skills from the CLI.

items.title: Agent sidebar context menu
items.description: Right-click rows in the agent sidebar to act on individual agents.

items.title: Terminal panel renamed to Agent
items.description: Relabeled the Terminal panel to Agent across the UI.

items.title: Explode-mode tab count
items.description: Task tabs hide in explode mode and a count shows how many are open.

items.title: Persistent assets folder state
items.description: The assets panel remembers which folders are expanded per task.

items.title: Smoother agent overview resize
items.description: Terminal hides during agent-overview resizing to prevent flicker.

items.title: Editor tabs track deleted files
items.description: Editor tabs close or flag when the underlying file is deleted on disk.

items.title: Overlay anchoring in explode mode
items.description: Overlay views now anchor correctly when explode mode toggles.

items.title: Seed skips orphan marketplace metadata
items.description: AI-config seed scrubs orphan marketplace metadata instead of erroring.

items.title: Clearer CLI DB error
items.description: slay CLI hints at alternate DB paths when openDb can't find one.

items.title: Versioned task assets
items.description: Content-addressed version history with a version tree, current pointer, lock rule, and CLI set-current.

items.title: Structured chat transport
items.description: Chat with autocomplete, streaming, resilient reset, idle state, effort, and queue.

items.title: Chat history persists
items.description: Terminal chat history now survives app reloads.

items.title: Git stash tab
items.description: New Stash tab in the unified git panel.

items.title: Zen mode toggle
items.description: Dedicated zen-mode icon toggle that also hides the task header.

items.title: Reparent tasks
items.description: Move tasks to a new parent via CLI, MCP, or the UI.

items.title: Clickable sub-task status
items.description: Tap a sub-task status icon to change it via popover.

items.title: In-asset search
items.description: Highlight and jump through matches in both raw and preview modes.

items.title: Processes URL pill
items.description: Detected server URLs show as a pill that opens the browser panel.

items.title: Copy task ID
items.description: Copy a task's ID straight from the settings header.

items.title: Trackpad pinch zoom
items.description: Browser panel supports 1x–3x trackpad pinch zoom.

items.title: Worktree color-coding
items.description: Color-coded worktree list with an authoritative registry; main worktree stays uncolored.

items.title: Ghostty-inspired dark theme
items.description: Reskinned slay dark theme with white text, Ghostty-inspired.

items.title: WebContentsView web panels
items.description: Migrated web panels from webview to WebContentsView for stability and perf.

items.title: Explode-mode grid
items.description: Sub-task grid columns size by available width and explode-mode header is richer.

items.title: CLI opens asset in UI
items.description: Creating or uploading an asset via CLI now opens it in the app.

items.title: Editor folder auto-expand
items.description: Compacted folders auto-expand to the first branch point.

items.title: Enable chat shortcut
items.description: New Enable chat entry in the terminal header menu with wider context menu.

items.title: Lock toast feedback
items.description: Toast appears when a locked project blocks creating a new tab.

items.title: PTY revival on status flip
items.description: Terminal revives its PTY when a task flips from done back to in-progress.

items.title: Dropped paths inline
items.description: Non-image file paths inline correctly on drop or paste into the terminal.

items.title: File tree rename
items.description: Directory rename input shows, Escape no longer triggers rename via onBlur, expandedFolders preserved.

items.title: New-task modal in locked project
items.description: Locked projects now allow the new-task modal and the modal no longer flashes during close.

items.title: Cmd+D in explode mode
items.description: Cmd+D scopes to the focused cell in explode mode.

items.title: Terminal copy trim
items.description: Trailing spaces are trimmed from copied terminal selections.

items.title: Subtasks layout
items.description: Settings panel no longer overflows with long sub-task lists; subtasks have min-h when few, flex-1 when many.

items.title: Import FK handling
items.description: Import defers FK checks and auto-derives FK remap.

items.title: Browser sub-frame errors
items.description: Browser panel ignores sub-frame did-fail-load events.

items.title: Provider fetch resilience
items.description: Usage analytics hardens provider fetch against transient net::ERR_FAILED.

items.title: Wide-mode markdown padding
items.description: Wide-mode markdown horizontal padding matches vertical.

items.title: Project Lock graduated
items.description: Project Lock moved out of Labs into the main Settings.

items.title: Lock UX overhaul
items.description: Full-takeover lock screen with Re-lock and Apply actions, plus blocked task creation while locked.

items.title: Notes line-spacing split
items.description: Split notes line-spacing into separate Readability and Width controls.

items.title: Live asset UI
items.description: Task asset panel now refreshes when file content changes on disk.

items.title: Instructions edits survive
items.description: AI config instructions no longer lose edits and react to disk changes.

items.title: Project locks
items.description: Lock a project with a duration, rate limit, and schedule to prevent accidental edits.

items.title: Project-scoped tabs
items.description: Per-project tab persistence with a Cmd+Shift+H shortcut to jump home.

items.title: Default provider select
items.description: Pick a default terminal-mode provider from the Providers settings tab.

items.title: Context Manager & Automations graduated
items.description: Both features moved out of Labs into the main settings.

items.title: Slimmer Settings layout
items.description: General tab removed and MCP extracted into its own tab.

items.title: Floating agent on tiling managers
items.description: Disabled by default and fixed compatibility with macOS tiling window managers.

items.title: Lock popover input width
items.description: Lock popover inputs now stretch to fill the full popover width.

items.title: Unified command palette
items.description: Cmd+K and Cmd+P now open one palette with fzf-based search, dual-score ranking, and match highlighting.

items.title: Floating agent panel
items.description: Agent panel has a proper state machine, menu, manual detach, auto-detach on window blur, and persistent sizing.

items.title: Custom project icons
items.description: Set a project icon using letters or an image.

items.title: Markdown split mode in editor
items.description: Toggle between source and preview with per-file and per-asset view persistence, plus Notion-like typography.

items.title: Browser panel auto-hide
items.description: Browser panel hides when the last tab closes; Cmd+T opens a new tab.

items.title: Stale skill detection
items.description: Stale-skill dots on context manager tabs and skill graph cards, plus per-provider sync in the editor.

items.title: Bound skill source banners
items.description: Bound skills are locked with a source banner and support sync and unlink from the file.

items.title: Agent panel provider controls
items.description: Pick the provider from a dropdown and reset conversation state from the panel header.

items.title: Search result pills
items.description: Task search results show status and priority as pills.

items.title: Skills group-by
items.description: Group the skills list by source or prefix via a new dropdown.

items.title: Kanban blocked pill
items.description: Blocked indicator moved to the card's bottom row as a pill.

items.title: Unbindable shortcuts
items.description: Clear a shortcut binding to disable it entirely.

items.title: New keyboard shortcuts
items.description: Cmd+J opens settings, Cmd+Shift+J toggles zen mode, Cmd+Shift+U updates the database.

items.title: CLI commit-and-done
items.description: New commit-and-done skill plus `slay tasks done --close` to close the tab after finishing.

items.title: Processes panel spinner
items.description: Loading spinner while processes panel fetches state.

items.title: Smarter browser URLs
items.description: Task browser defaults localhost and IP addresses to http://.

items.title: CLI init command reference
items.description: `slay init` prints the full command reference and suggests commands on error.

items.title: Terminal rebound to Cmd+K
items.description: Terminal, search, and processes shortcuts reshuffled for better finger ergonomics.

items.title: Context menu alignment
items.description: Context-menu rows now align cleanly via CSS subgrid.

items.title: Editor dark mode text colors
items.description: Dead prose selector no longer breaks text colors in dark mode.

items.title: Dev server Vite warmup
items.description: Removed broken Vite warmup block that could crash dev startup.

items.title: CLI HTTP errors surfaced
items.description: Silent HTTP failures in notifyApp and `slay tasks done --close` are now shown.

items.title: CLI --dev flag in tasks open
items.description: `slay tasks open` now respects the --dev flag.

items.title: Duplicate AI provider
items.description: Duplicate an existing provider configuration with one click in AI settings.

items.title: Marketplace library & project actions
items.description: Add or remove libraries and projects directly from marketplace skill cards.

items.title: Skill graph edge rendering
items.description: Fixed inconsistent edge styles and spurious back-edges in the skill graph.

items.title: Boot crash on skill registry update
items.description: Fixed datetime() SQL quoting that caused a crash on startup.

items.title: AI config graph crash
items.description: Fixed temporal dead zone crash when deleting edges in the AI config graph.

items.title: Leaderboard OAuth errors
items.description: OAuth callback errors are now surfaced instead of silently swallowed.

items.title: CLI --permanent flag
items.description: Use --permanent with slay tasks update to persist task changes.

items.title: Domain-specific slay skills
items.description: Split monolithic slay skill into 9 focused domain skills with rich documentation.

items.title: Skill marketplace sync
items.description: Installed skills now sync to disk automatically, and project-scoped skill init writes files directly.

items.title: Blocked task state
items.description: Tasks can be marked as blocked with a split button UI, blocking relationships, and B/Shift+B shortcuts.

items.title: Agent side panel
items.description: Persistent full-height agent panel accessible via Ctrl+Tab cycling.

items.title: Asset downloads
items.description: Download assets as PDF, PNG, HTML, or ZIP from a restructured download menu.

items.title: Inline tab rename
items.description: Double-click a task tab to rename it inline.

items.title: Redesigned surface tokens
items.description: New inset card panels and unified surface token scale across light and dark modes.

items.title: Editor syntax highlighting
items.description: Added Go, YAML, SQL, TOML, and HCL syntax highlighting to the editor.

items.title: Git status in file tree
items.description: File tree shows git status letter badges and italicizes ignored files.

items.title: Browser address bar search
items.description: Non-URL input in the browser address bar now searches Google.

items.title: Terminal word navigation
items.description: Option+Arrow keys now correctly move by word on macOS.

items.title: Terminal file links
items.description: Cmd+Click file links work on wrapped lines and bare filenames in parentheses.

items.title: Usage API reliability
items.description: Fixed first-429 backoff and stale cross-account data in usage tracking.

items.title: Editor list indentation
items.description: Unified indentation across bullet, ordered, and task lists.

items.title: Asset folders
items.description: Organize task assets into folders with drag-and-drop, context menus, and inline renaming.

items.title: Asset search
items.description: Find assets with a local search bar and global search panel integration.

items.title: Auto-reconcile skills
items.description: On-disk skills are automatically synced to the database, removing the unmanaged concept.

items.title: Asset card styling
items.description: Asset sidebar items and folders now render as styled cards.

items.title: Auto-refresh assets
items.description: Asset content refreshes automatically when updated via CLI.

items.title: Sidebar drag lock
items.description: Project drag in sidebar now locked to vertical axis to prevent accidental reordering.

items.title: Create-task form reset
items.description: Create-task form no longer resets when background data refreshes.

items.title: Markdown checkboxes
items.description: Checkboxes now render correctly in the markdown file editor.

items.title: Skill graph arrows
items.description: Dependency direction arrows now display correctly on skill graph edges.

items.title: Task assets
items.description: Attach files, images, and documents to tasks with a dedicated assets panel.

items.title: Asset mentions in editor
items.description: Link assets inline with @-mention picker and visual chips in the editor.

items.title: Auto-move tasks on terminal state
items.description: Tasks automatically move between columns when terminal state changes.

items.title: Asset CLI commands
items.description: Create, list, and manage task assets from the Slay CLI.

items.title: Project settings navigation
items.description: New Tasks category in project settings for task automation rules.

items.title: AI input timing
items.description: PTY submit now supports --wait for better AI mode input timing.

items.title: Windows PTY cleanup
items.description: Errors when killing PTY on Windows are now handled gracefully.

items.title: Usage analytics timezone
items.description: Daily usage grouping now uses local timezone instead of UTC.

items.title: Terminal cursor blink
items.description: Disabled distracting cursor blink in terminal panels.

items.title: Find in browser page
items.description: Use Cmd+F to search within browser panels.

items.title: Tasks from browser links
items.description: Turn any browser link into a new task with one click.

items.title: Session resume
items.description: Resume previous AI sessions when reopening tasks.

items.title: Web panel CLI commands
items.description: Create and manage web panels from the Slay CLI.

items.title: Priority keyboard shortcuts
items.description: New priority-based shortcut system prevents conflicts between panels.

items.title: Blocker search
items.description: Search and link blocker tasks with status icons.

items.title: Copy session & conversation IDs
items.description: Copy session and conversation IDs directly from the terminal dropdown menu.

items.title: CLI DB mismatch warning
items.description: CLI warns when the --dev flag targets a different database than the running app.

items.title: Browser zoom alignment
items.description: Browser views stay aligned when using app zoom.

items.title: Browser URL on navigation
items.description: URL input now updates correctly during history navigation.

items.title: Activity history
items.description: See a timeline of changes to your tasks, tags, and automations.

items.title: CLI install onboarding
items.description: Install the slay CLI directly from the onboarding flow.

items.title: Extended CLI commands
items.description: Manage tags, templates, automations, due dates, and web panels from the CLI.

items.title: Terminal copy history
items.description: Access previously copied text from the terminal context menu.

items.title: Collapsible notification groups
items.description: Collapse and expand notification sections to focus on what matters.

items.title: Cron schedule presets
items.description: Pick common schedules from a dropdown when setting up automations.

items.title: Collapsible task details
items.description: Task metadata now lives in a collapsible Details section.

items.title: Default terminal flags
items.description: Terminal now correctly falls back to default flags when none are set per-task.

items.title: Markdown checkboxes
items.description: Task list checkboxes now render and toggle properly in the editor.

items.title: Editor height
items.description: Description editor now fills the available card space correctly.

items.title: Project-scoped tags
items.description: Tag tasks with custom colored labels — each project gets its own set.

items.title: Task templates
items.description: Create reusable templates per project and apply them to new tasks instantly.

items.title: Snooze tasks
items.description: Temporarily hide tasks from the board until a time you choose.

items.title: Automations (beta)
items.description: Set up rules to automate repetitive task workflows.

items.title: Rich markdown editing
items.description: Edit markdown files with a visual toolbar — no raw syntax needed.

items.title: Loop command
items.description: Repeat an AI prompt automatically until your acceptance criteria are met.

items.title: Terminal context menu
items.description: Right-click terminal panes for quick actions like split, close, and restart.

items.title: Custom working directory
items.description: Override the working directory for individual tasks.

items.title: File tree upgrades
items.description: Multi-select, keyboard navigation, git status colors, and compact folders in the file tree.

items.title: Unified theme system
items.description: Terminal and editor colors now follow one consistent theme with per-section overrides.

items.title: Stuck terminal loading
items.description: Terminals no longer get stuck loading when a session ends unexpectedly.

items.title: Shortcuts in editors
items.description: App keyboard shortcuts now work while editing text in notes and editors.

items.title: Menus behind browser
items.description: Dropdown menus no longer hide behind the browser panel.

items.title: GitHub Copilot support
items.description: Use GitHub Copilot as an AI coding assistant directly inside SlayZone.

items.title: Drag-and-drop project reordering
items.description: Rearrange projects in the sidebar by dragging them into your preferred order.

items.title: Notes formatting toolbar
items.description: A new toolbar makes it easy to format your task notes with bold, lists, and more.

items.title: Move list items with keyboard
items.description: Rearrange list items in notes using Alt+Up/Down shortcuts.

items.title: Open links in new browser tabs
items.description: Cmd+Click or middle-click links in the browser to open them in a new tab.

items.title: Linear assignee filtering
items.description: Only import and sync Linear issues that are assigned to you.

items.title: Collapsible task description
items.description: Collapse the task description to free up space when you don't need it.

items.title: Background terminal output
items.description: Terminals now keep receiving output even when their tab isn't visible.

items.title: Terminal sizing
items.description: New terminals now match the actual panel size instead of starting too small.

items.title: Stopping processes
items.description: Stopping a process now fully shuts down all related sub-processes.

items.title: Terminal flickering
items.description: Fixed terminals sometimes flickering when switching between panels.

items.title: Claude Code on Linux & Windows
items.description: Fixed Claude Code authentication not being detected on Linux and Windows.

items.title: Qwen Code CLI integration
items.description: Full support for Qwen Code as an AI coding assistant with session detection, usage tracking, and MCP support.

items.title: Browser screenshot capture
items.description: Screenshot the browser view directly instead of requiring region selection.

items.title: Shortcuts blocked by modals
items.description: Global keyboard shortcuts no longer fire when a modal dialog is open.

items.title: Browser edit shortcuts
items.description: Native edit shortcuts (cut, copy, paste) now pass through to the browser view correctly.

items.title: Browser JS execution
items.description: Fixed browser view JavaScript execution to use the correct frame context.

items.title: New keyboard shortcuts
items.description: Restart terminals, focus the browser URL bar, and jump to the attention panel — all from the keyboard.

items.title: Browser loading animation
items.description: See a smooth loading animation while the browser panel starts up.

items.title: Auto-open browser from CLI
items.description: Running a navigate command from the CLI now opens the browser panel automatically.

items.title: Shortcut hints stay in sync
items.description: Shortcut hints throughout the app update to reflect your custom keybindings.

items.title: Better feedback dialog
items.description: Redesigned feedback dialog with quick links to GitHub and Discord.

items.title: Stuck loading spinner
items.description: Fixed a bug where reopening a task could leave the loading spinner spinning forever.

items.title: Alt shortcuts on macOS
items.description: Alt-based keyboard shortcuts now work reliably on macOS.

items.title: Clickable links in terminals
items.description: Links printed in terminals are now clickable with hover tooltips.

items.title: Smoother usage tracking
items.description: Usage data now handles rate limits gracefully instead of showing errors.

items.title: Custom keyboard shortcuts
items.description: Rebind any shortcut from the new shortcuts dialog — conflicts are detected and swapped automatically.

items.title: CLI --description flag
items.description: Set task descriptions directly from the Slay CLI with --description on create, update, and subtask-add.

items.title: Closable toast notifications
items.description: Toast notifications now have a close button so you can dismiss them immediately.

items.title: Smarter worktree branch cleanup
items.description: Removing a worktree now tries multiple strategies to clean up its branch.

items.title: What's New auto-expands new versions
items.description: The changelog dialog automatically expands all versions you haven't seen yet.

items.title: Stale task CWD
items.description: Task and project are now props instead of local state, fixing stale working directories.

items.title: Temporary task conversion
items.description: Converting a temporary task now correctly sets it to in-progress status.

items.title: Faster browser panel
items.description: The built-in browser is now significantly faster and more stable.

items.title: Browser keyboard capture
items.description: Choose whether keyboard shortcuts go to the browser or SlayZone with a single toggle.

items.title: AI crash recovery
items.description: If an AI agent crashes, its terminal drops into a regular shell so you can keep working.

items.title: Automatic data backups
items.description: Your data is automatically backed up before updates for extra safety.

items.title: Linux support improvements
items.description: SlayZone now follows Linux conventions for file and config locations.

items.title: Quick status changes
items.description: Click the status icon on any task or column header to change it instantly.

items.title: Cleaner worktree removal
items.description: Deleting a worktree now offers to clean up its branch too.

items.title: Worktree file presets
items.description: Pick from ready-made presets when setting up files for new worktrees.

items.title: Scrollable sub-tasks
items.description: Long sub-task lists now scroll neatly instead of stretching the page.

items.title: Crash recovery
items.description: SlayZone now recovers automatically instead of showing a blank screen after a rare crash.

items.title: Newlines in AI prompts
items.description: Shift+Enter now correctly adds a new line when typing AI prompts.

items.title: Project switching cleanup
items.description: Switching projects now properly resets task state so nothing carries over by accident.

items.title: Editor folder memory
items.description: Folders you expanded in the file tree stay open when you come back.

items.title: Jira Cloud integration (Labs)
items.description: Connect your Jira Cloud account to sync issues directly into SlayZone. Enable in Settings → Labs.

items.title: Multi-repo projects
items.description: Projects now support multiple repositories with auto-detection.

items.title: Processes panel
items.description: New dedicated panel to monitor and manage running processes.

items.title: Process names on terminal tabs
items.description: Terminal tabs now show the running process name with duplicate numbering.

items.title: File tree refresh
items.description: Added a refresh button to the file editor sidebar.

items.title: Usage bar layout
items.description: Fixed boost pill popover layout and normalized spacer widths.

items.title: Clickable terminal links
items.description: URLs and file paths in terminals are now clickable — Cmd+Click opens files, Cmd+Shift+Click opens in default app.

items.title: Worktree sync & merge
items.description: New sync dropdown with merge-to-parent and use-existing-branch options.

items.title: Fullscreen task descriptions
items.description: Task descriptions open in a distraction-free fullscreen dialog.

items.title: Process stats
items.description: Active terminals and processes now show CPU, memory, duration, and restart count.

items.title: Sidebar reorganized
items.description: Leaderboard and usage buttons moved to the sidebar footer for cleaner navigation.

items.title: Drag to empty groups
items.description: Tasks can now be dropped into empty list-view groups.

items.title: Browser logins
items.description: CAPTCHAs and OAuth popups now work reliably in the browser panel.

items.title: Worktree file copying
items.description: Creating worktrees no longer freezes the UI, and junk files are excluded.

items.title: Diverged branch graph
items.description: Commit graph now correctly renders diverged local/remote branches.

items.title: Integrations in beta
items.description: Sync tasks with Linear and GitHub from one place, with easy discovery of unlinked tasks.

items.title: Git panel settings
items.description: Customize commit graph defaults and save display preferences per project.

items.title: Faster app startup
items.description: The app loads significantly faster thanks to smaller bundles and smarter loading.

items.title: Smoother board loading
items.description: Kanban boards now load in a single step instead of multiple sequential fetches.

items.title: Snappier commit graph
items.description: Commit graph handles large repos much better with less memory usage.

items.title: Faster terminal rendering
items.description: Terminals feel more responsive with hardware-accelerated rendering and reduced overhead.

items.title: Commit graph display
items.description: Fixed various visual glitches in the commit graph layout.

items.title: Terminal reconnection
items.description: Switching back to a terminal no longer replays its entire history.

items.title: Sync reliability
items.description: Tasks now properly archive when deleted or archived in Linear/GitHub.

items.title: In-app feedback dialog
items.description: Send feedback directly from the app with Discord forum integration.

items.title: Full-file diff toggle
items.description: View entire files in the diff viewer instead of just changed hunks.

items.title: Process stop action
items.description: Stop running processes directly from the process panel.

items.title: Configurable commit graph
items.description: Branch-focused commit graph with legend, tooltips, and tag support.

items.title: Leaderboard
items.description: Track AI coding agent activity across tasks.

items.title: Git-ignored file copying
items.description: Automatically copy git-ignored files when creating worktrees, configurable per project.

items.title: Persistent home panel state
items.description: Home panel visibility and git tab selection saved per project.

items.title: Active tab styling
items.description: Active task tab is now more visually prominent.

items.title: Scrollable sidebar
items.description: Project list in sidebar now scrolls when overflowing.

items.title: Terminal bottom clipping
items.description: Fixed bottom content being clipped by FitAddon padding mismatch.

items.title: Shell startup flags
items.description: Removed persisted shell override that caused incorrect startup flags.

items.title: Webview surface clipping
items.description: Fixed browser panel clipping under CSS transforms.

items.title: Pull request dashboard
items.description: Full PR tab with create/link, merge controls, diff view, comments timeline, and mermaid diagrams.

items.title: Branch & worktree graph
items.description: Visual branch/worktree tabs with graph view, actions, and PR status at a glance.

items.title: Worktree tab grouping
items.description: Task tabs grouped by worktree with colored borders for quick identification.

items.title: Git push/pull controls
items.description: Push and pull directly from the git panel with remote URL display.

items.title: Configurable rate-limit bars
items.description: Customize usage bars with support for custom providers.

items.title: Per-view panel toggles
items.description: Configure which panels show on home vs task views independently.

items.title: Main-thread freezes eliminated
items.description: Git and GitHub CLI operations no longer block the UI.

items.title: Layout shift on tab switch
items.description: Fixed xterm scrollbar leak and layout jump when switching tabs.

items.title: Terminal theme picker
items.description: Choose from 16 curated terminal color themes.

items.title: Database backups
items.description: Automatic SQLite database backup system to protect your data.

items.title: Interactive CLI prompts fixed
items.description: Sync query responses and OSC filtering fix broken interactive prompts.

items.title: Copy/paste on Linux & Windows
items.description: Ctrl+Shift+C/V now works for terminal copy/paste on non-macOS.

items.title: Usage rate limiting
items.description: Added caching and 429 backoff to prevent API rate limiting.

items.title: Custom AI providers
items.description: Add any AI CLI as a terminal mode with custom commands, flags, and settings.

items.title: Getting started checklist
items.description: New onboarding checklist guides you through initial setup step by step.

items.title: Worktrees management panel
items.description: Create, switch, and delete git worktrees from a dedicated panel in the kanban view.

items.title: Terminal focus on tab switch
items.description: Switching task tabs now auto-focuses the terminal — no extra click needed.

items.title: Unknown terminal modes handled
items.description: Tasks with unrecognized terminal modes no longer crash the UI.

items.title: Terminal reinit on save
items.description: Saving a conversation ID no longer restarts the terminal session.

items.title: Per-panel settings
items.description: Configure editor, diff, terminal, and browser panels individually from a dedicated settings page.

items.title: Drill-down settings navigation
items.description: Settings now use a drill-down layout — less clutter, easier discovery.

items.title: Dark mode text selection
items.description: Selected text is now visible in dark mode.

items.title: Claude Code Switch integration
items.description: Claude Code Switch integrated into the profile dropdown for quick access.

items.title: Execution contexts
items.description: Run tasks on your host, in Docker containers, or over SSH — configurable per project.

items.title: Undo stale snapshot
items.description: Undoing task completion no longer uses a stale task snapshot.

items.title: Task processes cleaned up on archive
items.description: Archiving or purging a task now kills its background processes, not just terminals.

items.title: Light & dark theme selector
items.description: Choose between light, dark, or system theme from settings — light mode fully polished.

items.title: Undo/redo for task mutations
items.description: Accidentally moved a task? Undo and redo any task change instantly.

items.title: Worktree setup scripts
items.description: Drop a .slay/worktree-setup.sh in your project — it runs automatically when creating worktrees.

items.title: Task settings panel header
items.description: Settings panel now matches the consistent header style of other panels.

items.title: Codex session detection
items.description: Codex session IDs are now auto-detected from disk instead of requiring manual entry.

items.title: Git error messages cleaned up
items.description: Worktree git errors no longer show the "Command failed" prefix.

items.title: Custom task status workflows
items.description: Define your own statuses per project — name them, group them, reorder them. Kanban columns follow your workflow.

items.title: Git diff folder actions
items.description: Stage, unstage, and discard entire folders at once. Confirmation modals protect against accidental discards.

items.title: Per-provider skill sync
items.description: SKILL.md files sync independently per AI provider — Claude, Codex, Gemini each get their own context.

items.title: Context manager
items.description: Browse, diff, and manually sync project context files across providers from a dedicated panel.

items.title: Per-project processes
items.description: Background processes are now scoped to the active project instead of global.

items.title: Auto-switch project
items.description: Clicking a task tab automatically switches to its project — no more manual selection.

items.title: Browser tab stability
items.description: Fixed a race condition that could lose non-main tab URLs when switching quickly.

items.title: Global file search
items.description: Cmd+Shift+F searches across all files in your project — from any tab.

items.title: Project color tints
items.description: Tabs, task detail, and kanban cards pick up your project's color for quick visual grouping.

items.title: Pinnable usage bars
items.description: Pin or unpin inline API usage bars per provider — keep only what you care about visible.

items.title: In-app changelog
items.description: See what's new every time you update — opens automatically on version upgrade.

items.title: Appearance settings
items.description: Customize font sizes across the app and enable reduced motion for a calmer experience.

items.title: Faster startup
items.description: Parallel splash screen and pre-populated app — visible content on first frame.

items.title: Windows support
items.description: Shell, environment, and git operations stabilized for Windows.

items.title: The Slay CLI
items.description: Create, update, search, and manage tasks without leaving your terminal. Full CRUD, completions, and auto-project scoping.

items.title: Multi-panel home screen
items.description: Open kanban, git, editor, and processes side by side — all on the home tab.

items.title: Tooltips everywhere
items.description: Every panel, button, and control now has helpful tooltip hints.

items.title: Processes panel
items.description: Monitor and manage background tasks — dev servers, builds, watchers — from a dedicated panel.

items.title: Daily leaderboard
items.description: Opt-in anonymous weekly coding streaks. See how you stack up.

items.title: Inline DevTools
items.description: Chromium DevTools embedded right inside the browser panel. No more separate windows.

items.title: Focused panel glow
items.description: A subtle glow shows which panel is currently active — gone when there's only one.

items.title: Terminal injection fix
items.description: Escape sequence responses no longer inject garbage characters into your terminal.

items.title: Crash recovery
items.description: Terminals now auto-recover from crashes with built-in health checks and diagnostics.

items.title: Smarter Cmd+W
items.description: Closes the focused pane first — terminal split, editor file, browser tab — then the task tab.

items.title: Copy URL in browser
items.description: One-click button to copy the current browser panel URL.

items.title: Blocked external launches
items.description: Webviews can no longer silently open apps like Spotify or Zoom.

items.title: Split terminal groups
items.description: Drag terminals into groups and run them side by side within a single task.

items.title: Responsive browser preview
items.description: Test your app across phone, tablet, and desktop viewports — all inline.

items.title: Drag files from Finder
items.description: Drop files and folders straight from Finder into the editor tree.

items.title: Image preview in editor
items.description: Open images directly in the editor panel instead of an external app.

items.title: Priority signal bars
items.description: Kanban cards now show signal-bar indicators so you can spot high-priority tasks at a glance.

items.title: Update toast
items.description: When a new version is downloaded, a toast appears — restart with one click.

items.title: Explode mode
items.description: Grid view of every open task terminal at once. See all your agents working in parallel.
